LanguageData.WNAMod_enableIdeoConflictHostility: Enable ideology conflict and hostility. When colony ideo contains some certain meme or precept, Whelingnorther Alliance will turn hostile. \n\n(Disabled by default)
LanguageData.WNAMod_enablePermaconstDeathAid: Enable Permaconst reinforcement: When a pawn enthralled by Permaconst Command dies, there is about 7% chance that they will immediately summon a "Hunting Cluster" raid. \n\n(Disabled by default)
LanguageData.WNA_Refill_Desc: Whelingnorther Alliance has rebuilt their lost settlements and got prepared for further actions.
